Notes on Jagić's edition of the Codex Marianus (Mariinskoje
četveroevangelije, Berlin 1883). The codex is a Glagolitic tetraevangelium
of the early eleventh century; Jagić's apparatus prints the text in
Cyrillic transliteration with the Glagolitic readings in the notes.

The opening of Mark in Jagić's transliteration reads зачѧло евангелиѣ
исоусхристова сꙑна божиѣ. Compare the CCMH transcription of the same
verse, which keeps the manuscript's superscripts and titla.
